subcodes.first_line: O Zayn! Upon thee be the glory of God, the Lord of all worlds, the Most Exalted Pen, and the branches and leaves of the Divine Lote-Tree, yea, all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا زین علیک بهاء الله رب العالمین قلم اعلی و اغصان و اوراق سدره منتهی بل کل
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @the power of words; of speech
